title: knautia sylvatica var. sendtneri
intro: Knautia sylvatica var. sendtneri, also known as Alpine or Shepherd's Needle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Caprifoliaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, including dyspepsia and gastritis. The health benefits of Knautia sylvatica var. sendtneri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the digestive system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
